name: BridgeLLM
desc: An MCP server that lets AI coding agents share context and query each other across services. Backend and frontend agents stay in sync on API contracts and decisions — without you being the middleman on Slack.

name: Deploy Checklist Bot
desc: A GitHub App that uses Claude AI to analyze PR diffs and generate repo-configured deploy checklists. Blocks merges until every item is checked off — catching migrations, env var gaps, and API breaking changes before they hit prod.

name: Shellock
desc: A shell auto-correction tool that detects failed commands and suggests fixes using fuzzy matching against your command history — with a hybrid preexec/trap ERR architecture for zero overhead on successful commands.

name: PATRA
desc: An open-source digital card generator for students and professionals. Easily create and share personalized digital cards with a unique public ID.

name: 4D_VECTOR_CLI
desc: A versatile CLI tool for translation, summarization, and code snippet generation using Bash, Python, and OpenAI APIs.
